_comment: KUT (Kampala Uganda Temple) project_config.json worked example. Copy to <project>/_BIM_COORD/project_config.json (or wherever TagConfig.LoadFromFile reads it for this project). Six-building campus: BLD1 Temple, BLD2 Meetinghouse, BLD3 Housing/Ancillary, BLD4 Grounds, BLD5 Utility, BLD6 Guard House, EXT site-wide. SEQ is grouped per building (SEQ_INCLUDE_LOC) so sequence numbers restart per building; ZONE is not part of the sequence key (SEQ_INCLUDE_ZONE false).
